title: View Latest Turn File Changes in Diff

findings.description: No per-turn diff viewing UI visible. The top navigation has Chat/Code/Cowork tabs. The 'Code' tab may contain diff viewing but requires an active conversation. Cannot test due to known crash bug when clicking existing conversations.
findings.expected: A diff viewer showing file changes made by each turn in the conversation.
findings.actual: No diff viewer visible in new chat view. Code tab exists but untestable without active conversation.
findings.blocked_by: Known issue: clicking existing conversations crashes the app

verdict: Feature not implemented or blocked from testing. Code tab may contain diff features but requires active conversation.
